rules: external MCP requires documented service and clear data flow
block personal/confidential/secret outbound data without user approval
reject npx -y or equivalent auto-download execution

modules.notes: Use for reviewed local filesystem assistance only.
Use for local git inspection or reviewed local git actions.
Use for reviewed local session or activity observation only.
Use only with reviewed non-sensitive payloads and clear scope.
Use only under browser policy and clear target understanding.
